structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-04-01 Chase CLP LLPA Waiver
From: Lock Desk <lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-04-01 11:35:39-07:00



Update to Agency (LLPA) Waivers for Chase Community Lending Program (CLP)

 

Effective for loans locked on or after April 11, 2025, Chase will no longer be waiving Agency LLPAs on their Community Lending Program.  The Chase CRA Bonus will still apply.  Polly will be updated the morning of April 11th with these changes.

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting (jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product (ProductDept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:ProductDept@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk (lock.desk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> )

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
